Scope 1: Launch Pad Educational Program

Community Engagement (CE) - partner provides funding or sponsorship tied to shared activity outcomes.

Activity Basics

Question

Activity Description (Short)

Our team created and delivered Scope 1: Launch Pad educational program focused on sustainable open innovation.
